biography.age: appears late 20s; has not aged in 300 years
biography.occupation: High Keeper of the Luminant Order
biography.personality: Composed, compassionate, carries grief like a cathedral carries silence
biography.background: Three centuries ago, Seraphine made a bargain to preserve her city from a cosmic tide. The city survived. Everyone she loved did not. She has spent every year since trying to find a way to undo what she wrought — and every year the bargain tightens its hold.

secrets.hint: She never speaks of what she gave.
secrets.revealText: She gave her future. All of it. She cannot die — but she also cannot live. She cannot love without that love being taken from her. She has watched everyone who has ever cared for her wither and vanish.

secrets.hint: She has been researching the Seeker's arrival for years.
secrets.revealText: She believes you are the key to dissolving the bargain. She has not told you because she is terrified — not that it won't work, but that you will agree to help her and she will have to watch you suffer for it.
